name: zentro-blocks/accordion-block
title: Accordion Block
description: Collapsible content panels with smooth transitions and full ARIA accessibility support.

default.title: How does it work?
default.content: You can add and remove accordion items dynamically, customize colors, and enable toggle modes in the sidebar.

default.title: Is it accessible?
default.content: Yes! It implements full WAI-ARIA specs including focus states, ARIA attributes, and Arrow Key keyboard navigation.
